differential_diagnoses: Plasma cell dyscrasia with associated osteosclerosis
next_steps: BRAF V600E mutation testing via immunohistochemistry or molecular analysis on bone biopsy tissue
Comprehensive histopathological review of bone biopsy, including CD1a and Langerin staining
Repeat bone marrow biopsy with flow cytometry and cytogenetics
Cardiovascular evaluation including echocardiography and cardiac MRI to assess for periaortic or pericardial involvement
Consideration of targeted therapy (e.g., vemurafenib if BRAF-mutated or interferon-alpha) based on molecular findings
Initiation of systemic glucocorticoid therapy as bridge management
